institution.name: Phillips Community College of the University of Arkansas

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Phillips Community College of the University of Arkansas are 14% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($29.6k vs $34.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Phillips Community College of the University of Arkansas rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.0k → $3.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Phillips Community College of the University of Arkansas fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (13.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Phillips Community College of the University of Arkansas rose 18% between 2007 and 2010 (21.1% → 25.0%).
